items.name: Grokking-MI
items.description: To train a transformer on (a + b) mod 97. It memorises the training data perfectly by epoch 100 — then nothing happens for 200 more epochs — then it suddenly generalises to 100% on data it has never seen. That's grokking, and it's one of the most scientifically interesting open problems in deep learning.
